meanings.definition: the use of electricity to administer punishment or torture
examples: they used cattle prods to administer electric shocks

meanings.definition: trauma caused by the passage of electric current through the body (as from contact with high voltage lines or being struck by lightning); usually involves burns and abnormal heart rhythm and unconsciousness
a reflex response to the passage of electric current through the body
examples: subjects received a small electric shock when they made the wrong response
electricians get accustomed to occasional shocks
